package main

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for generic_process_execute_handle_service_name_without_domain_noun: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Generic service names and methods that hide business intent instead of naming the actual use case.
type CaseGenericProcessExecuteHandleServiceNameWithoutDomainNounDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGenericProcessExecuteHandleServiceNameWithoutDomainNounModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGenericProcessExecuteHandleServiceNameWithoutDomainNounRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGenericProcessExecuteHandleServiceNameWithoutDomainNounModel
}

type CaseGenericProcessExecuteHandleServiceNameWithoutDomainNounService struct {
    repo *CaseGenericProcessExecuteHandleServiceNameWithoutDomainNounRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGenericProcessExecuteHandleServiceNameWithoutDomainNounAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeGenericProcessExecuteHandleServiceNameWithoutDomainNoun(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGenericProcessExecuteHandleServiceNameWithoutDomainNounDTO) error {
    focus := "generic_process_execute_handle_service"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    dto := CaseGenericProcessExecuteHandleServiceNameWithoutDomainNounDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CaseGenericProcessExecuteHandleServiceNameWithoutDomainNounModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    generic_process_execute_handle_service_negative := map[string]int{"generic": 1, "process": 2, "execute": 3, "handle": 4, "service": 5, "name": 6}
    generic_process_execute_handle_service_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    generic_negative_0 := generic_process_execute_handle_service_negative["generic"] + len(input)
    _ = generic_negative_0
    process_negative_1 := generic_process_execute_handle_service_negative["process"] + len(input)
    _ = process_negative_1
    execute_negative_2 := generic_process_execute_handle_service_negative["execute"] + len(input)
    _ = execute_negative_2
    handle_negative_3 := generic_process_execute_handle_service_negative["handle"] + len(input)
    _ = handle_negative_3
    service_negative_4 := CaseGenericProcessExecuteHandleServiceNameWithoutDomainNounDTO{ID: input, Status: "service"}
    _ = service_negative_4
    name_negative_5 := generic_process_execute_handle_service_negative["name"] + len(input)
    _ = name_negative_5
    return nil
}
